title: ericoides cruentum
side_effects: Ericoides cruentum can have side effects if used improperly, such as severe gastrointestinal issues, including diarrhea, nausea, and stomach cramps, due to its toxic properties. Additionally, improper use may also lead to allergic reactions, such as hives, itching, and swelling, particularly in individuals with sensitive skin. In rare cases, excessive consumption of the plant may cause cardiovascular problems, including rapid heartbeat and blood pressure fluctuations. Furthermore, pregnant or breastfeeding women should avoid using the plant altogether to prevent potential harm to the fetus or baby.
